scope.rationale: COCO 와는 별개 데이터셋 — 20 클래스 / XML 어노테이션. data-sanity-coco 와 분리된 phase. baseline 평가 분할 = VOC2007 test (mAP@0.5).

steps.name: download-voc
steps.success_metric: jq -e '.integrity_ok == true and .image_counts["voc07-trainval"] == 5011 and .image_counts["voc07-test"] == 4952 and .image_counts["voc12-trainval"] == 11540' runs/{run_dir}/manifest.json

steps.name: analyze-voc
steps.success_metric: jq -e '.num_classes == 20 and .bbox_xyxy_valid == true and .class_id_valid == true' runs/{run_dir}/stats.json

steps.name: visualize-voc
steps.success_metric: test -f runs/{run_dir}/figs/class_dist.png && test -f runs/{run_dir}/figs/bbox_size.png && test -f runs/{run_dir}/figs/image_size.png && test -f runs/{run_dir}/figs/samples.png
